PLANNING.enterCondition: Task submitted, no plan exists yet

EXECUTING.enterCondition: Valid plan exists, current step is pending
EXECUTING.exitCondition: Current step produces a result (success or failure)

VERIFYING.exitCondition: Verification command exits with 0 (pass) or non-0 (fail)

DONE.exitCondition: Terminal state — only RESET event can leave

FAILED.enterCondition: Max retries exhausted OR unrecoverable error
FAILED.exitCondition: Terminal state — only RESET event can leave
